nasb.text: Then Elisha said to him, “Go, say to him, ‘You will surely recover,’ but the Lord has shown me that he will certainly die.”

esv.text: And Elisha said to him, “Go, say to him, ‘You shall certainly recover,’ but the Lord has shown me that he shall certainly die.”

cnv.text: 以利沙對他說：“你去告訴他說：‘你一定會痊愈的’，但耶和華指示我，他一定要死。”

ccb.text: 以利沙对哈薛说：“你去告诉他，他一定会痊愈。不过，耶和华告诉我他会死。”
